title: tephrocactus articulatus var. inermis
intro: Tephrocactus articulatus var. inermis, also known as the spineless chain fruit cholla, is a type of cactus that belongs to the family Cactaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tephrocactus articulatus var. inermis include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to treat various infections and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effectiveness.
